entry.title: Re: How to link new bank account to an entity in SAP BYD?
entry.content:
Hello Sameer,

After you linked the bank g/l account to an Account Determination Group for a specific Chart of Accounts and Account Determination Profile - you should select this Account Determination Group (ADG) for the selected House-Bank Account under:

WoC: Liquidity Management / Master Data / My Bank ID / Edit Bank Accounts => Account /
Account Determination Group.

Hope this helps,

Frank

entry.title: Re: SAP COURSE
entry.content:
Hi @MusscaN 
I recommend to access the student zone of SAP Learning to start learning and check out some of the career opportunities!
Regarding  learning material I recommend to access our learning journeys posted on our SAP Learning platform  and check our  Learning Journeys. These are interactive, visual maps illustrating recommended paths to SAP software competency, or expansion of skill levels for all roles and SAP solutions. They provide easy-to-navigate, learning content to help you gain the skills you need and prepare for an SAP Certification. You can follow the recommendations and track your progress toward your learning goals. Or access a topic related course. You can browse all courses. If you you filter for SAP ERP you see a great variety:  here
Are you looking for SAP ERP Asset Management, SAP ERP Finance, SAP ERP Logistic Executions and Warehouse Management, SAP ERP Product Management or else?

In addition, I requested to move your post to our Beginner Corner. This Learning Group is an interactive virtual space dedicated to beginners, students and lecturers studying on learning.sap.com. Others members may weigh-in with their own ideas and  other experts or peers can chime in on this as well. 

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to check change log for condition contract
entry.content: Thanks @Gauthier Victor . I will implement the note and check the behavior and confirm back.

entry.title: Re: Cors issue when using API
entry.content:
@amelendez Hi Cors issue is not solved by using the ui5 code snippet given by Api Hub. My advice is just to refer to the DMC Custom Extensions Github package. 

Br,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: How to insert URL in SO10 standard text in sap for SAP script print preview in sales order (VA03)?
entry.content:
Hi Kudos,

Greetings of the day!
I am trying to get the URL/HYPER link in sales order print preview from SO1O text. I am using the SO10 text in SAP Script.

I tried several methods href, SO72....etc t-code but I am not able to get the hyper/URL link it is printing as hard code text in the print preview hyper link.

can some one help here!

now it is possible:

entry.title: Re: Embrace Defect Corrections with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Riccardo,

thank you for the feedback!

Here is a link to the planned functionality 'Extended relations from feature to defect':

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=951BE4DE95861EDDA3A11D89CE4D4351

entry.title: Re: IAS as central user management system
entry.content:
SAP Cloud Identity Services have emerged as the central approach for identity and access management (IAM) in SAP landscapes over the past few years. The key benefit of this strategy is the unification and simplification of user and rights management across all SAP applications. This is highlighted in the latest SAP CIO Guide on "Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes," which focuses on consolidating IAM services.

Benefits of SAP Cloud Identity Services:

  • Centralized User Management: Many SAP applications and sub-accounts within the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) currently manage their own users, resulting in unnecessary complexity and increased administrative effort. With SAP Cloud Identity Services, centralized user management is enabled, eliminating this challenge.

  • Reduced Effort in Deploying New Applications: New applications and functionalities in SAP BTP require that the identity directory in SAP Cloud Identity Services includes all relevant users. Centralized management through this service significantly reduces the effort needed to manage user directories, as subsequent applications no longer require separate directories. For example, activating SAP Task Center becomes much simpler without the need for extensive IAM projects.

  • Future-Proof and Scalable: Many new SAP applications, such as SAP Joule and upcoming features, already rely on SAP Cloud Identity Services. These services form the backbone for future expansion and integration of new features into SAP landscapes. Without using SAP Cloud Identity Services, it would be much harder to benefit from new innovations and functionalities.

  • Strategic Alignment: SAP's strategy focuses on centralizing identity and access management and consolidating user administration. SAP Cloud Identity Services serve as the central IAM interface, simplifying not only integration and security but also allowing for easier and more consistent cross-vendor integrations, such as with Microsoft Entra ID.

  • Summary: SAP Cloud Identity Services offer a centralized and future-proof framework for integrating and managing identities across the entire SAP landscape. This reduces complexity and administrative burden, while also enabling companies to take advantage of future innovations without requiring extensive adjustments to existing systems.

To fully utilize new applications and functionalities within SAP BTP, it’s essential that the identity directory in SAP Cloud Identity Services contains all relevant users. SAP's long-term strategy aims to simplify this complexity using SAP Cloud Identity Services by centralizing user and group management, enabling remote administration of the entire SAP cloud landscape through APIs. For this functionality, the identity directory must be populated with all necessary users, making it easier to manage policies via the Authorization Management Service (AMS).

It is recommended to persist user profiles in the IAS and enable identity federation. Persisting user profiles in the Identity Directory (IdDS) is also essential for authorization in SAP applications. For new applications in the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), the UUID or SAP global User ID plays an increasingly important role (e.g., for the BTP Task Center).

While the initial setup of SAP Cloud Identity Services may involve additional effort for the first application, it greatly reduces the workload for subsequent applications since no additional application-specific user directories are required.

Conclusion:

  • SAP Cloud Identity Services act as the "single point of configuration and integration" for SAP applications with APIs to Microsoft Entra ID as the leading system.
  • Access to individual hybrid SAP applications is managed through groups and user memberships in Entra ID.
  • Synchronization of these groups and users is ensured via SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS) and SCIM to integrate them into SAP Cloud Identity (SCI), specifically into the Identity Directory (IdDS).
  • Entra ID (for example) continues to function in the background as the master controller for groups and the central source for user data, which is then enriched by SAP Cloud Identity Services. 
    SO YOU WONT MANAGE USERS MANUALLY IN IDDS BUT JUST IN ENTRA ID
  • The Identity Directory within SAP Cloud Identity Services centralizes user information and permissions, and Identity Provisioning enables the transfer of this information to business applications, ensuring synchronization of user attributes and permissions across systems.
  • SAP has developed a strategy where Cloud Identity Services are seen as the interface into the SAP world, with the goal of making integration with existing identity management as simple as possible.

entry.title: Re: Show Approver Name on Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using below query to get the details of Approver in Purchase Order

SELECT Distinct(T3.[U_NAME])

FROM OPOR T0
INNER JOIN OWDD T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry AND T1.ObjType = '22'
INNER JOIN WDD1 T2 ON T1.WddCode = T2.WddCode
INNER JOIN OUSR T3 ON T2.UserID = T3.USERID
WHERE T1.Status = 'Y' and T0.DocEntry =  %DocEntry%

entry.title: Re: Announcing Global Availability of the Content Generation Assistant in SAP Automation Pilot!
entry.content:
Hi @antoniyatsoneva,

Great to hear this is now general available.
Does this come without additional costs? If not, where can I find information on the pricing? 
Thanks in advance,
  Alexander

entry.title: I have disabled CSRF under https adapter still getting 403 forbidden error
Re: ABAP MailOutput Content-Type:text/html; charset="us-ascii"Content-Transfer-Encoding:qu
entry.content: Thanks for the Reply and support I got the solution for this in the subject of outlook "\n" causing the issue as this character passes in the subject of mail

entry.title: Langchain Summarization Techniques: Leveraging SAP GenAI Hub via Custom Model
entry.content:
Introduction

Hey Folks, it's Navya again!

Navigating the vast amount of information in the business world requires both precision and efficiency. Extracting essential insights by summarizing extensive textual data/ latent data can significantly enhance decision-making and operational strategies.

Langchain offers a robust framework to streamline this process, especially when integrated with custom models and SAP Hub via the CAP LLM Plugin for anonymizing sensitive data.

In this blog post, we will explore the technical details of using Langchain’s summarization chain, incorporating custom model class, and integrating seamlessly with SAP GenAI Hub via the cap-llm-plugin. By understanding these tools and techniques, businesses can enhance their intelligence efforts and make more informed decisions.

In the above diagram, we utilize Langchain's summarization chain with its three techniques: stuff, map-reduce, and refine for generating summaries. It supports various chat models such as Open AI, Anthropic, and Llama. However, for handling business data, we need to connect to the SAP GenAI Hub to utilize LLM models. To achieve this, a custom chat model is implemented where in the "cap-llm-plugin" library is utilized, to directly connects to the SAP GenAI Hub.

Let’s get started!

Summarization Chain and it’s Techniques

Summarization plays a crucial role in natural language processing (NLP) by distilling extensive volumes of text into concise summaries. Langchain's summarization chain supports 3 techniques i.e. Stuff, Refine, Map-Reduce.
Each technique offers unique advantages and limitations, rendering them appropriate for various use cases.

Let’s delve deeper into each of these techniques:

  1. Stuff:
    The Stuff method handles list of documents, insert them all into a prompt, and pass that prompt to an LLM for summarization

    Pros & Cons:
    • Straightforward Approach: Stuff is a straightforward approach where we include all the data given in the prompt to be passed as context to the language model.
    • Simple Usage: You only need to make a single call to the LLM as the LLM has access to all the data at once.
    • Not good for large documents: Most LLMs have a maximum context length, and for large docs or many docs, this approach becomes impractical.

  2. Map-Reduce:
    The Map-Reduce method is a 2-step process that simplifies the task of summarizing a document, namely map and reduce.
    • Document is divided into small, manageable chunks based on either functional requirements or maximum number of tokens allowed for a specific LLM model
    • In Map step, each chunk is individually summarized using LLMChain.
    • In Reduce step, we aim to combine these individual summaries into one cohesive final summary.



      Pros & Cons:
      • Good for Large Documents: Efficiently divides and summarizes large documents. It also overcomes token limit constraints by iteratively reducing chunks
      • More Processing Time: Involves multiple iterations which may impact processing time.
  3. Refine

    The chain updates a rolling summary by iterating over the documents in a sequence. In each iteration, the current document and the previously generated summary are passed as prompt for summarization.

    Fig 2.3. Refine

    Pros & Cons:

    • Increases Relevance: Has the potential to incorporate more relevant context, potentially resulting in less loss of information compared to Map-Reduce.
    • Can lead to slow processing: Good things take time, and so does refine. It involves a larger number of LLM calls, that aren’t independent and can’t be parallelized like Map-Reduce.

How to Implement Summarization Chain?

Summarization chains can be a game-changer for efficiently extracting key insights by summarizing large volumes of text. LangChain provides implementation support for summarization chain in both Python and JavaScript library.

  • For implementation in Python you can follow the following documentation: [Python] Summarize Text
  • For implementation in JavaScript you can follow the following documentation: [Js] Summarization

Langchain offers 3 different chain for previously mentioned summarization techniques: StuffDocumentsChain, MapReduceDocumentsChain, RefineDocumentsChain . It also provides a convenient method “loadSummarizationChain” which returns corresponding chain based on type.

Let’s explore how to implement a summarization chain specifically tailored for SAP environments.

Creation of Custom Models

To efficiently manage business data within SAP, connecting to the SAP GenAI Hub to utilize LLM chat models is essential. The SAP GenAI Hub offers a robust platform for accessing and leveraging advanced large language models, enhancing our ability to process and summarize extensive business data effectively.

Problem Statement
The summarization chain provided by Langchain connects directly with Open LLM chat models like OpenAI, Anthropic, Llama, and others. However, In SAP BTP context, to access these LLMs in our scenario, we need to go through the SAP GenAI Hub. The solution is to create a custom model that connects to the SAP GenAI Hub and use it in Langchain’s summarization chains.

Solution Overview
For this scenario I’ll be creating a custom chat model in JavaScript to connect to the SAP GenAI Hub using the cap-llm-plugin library.  This custom model will enable us to make LLM calls via the SAP GenAI Hub.

Below is an example of how to create a custom chat model:

 

 

const { SimpleChatModel } = require("@langchain/core/language_models/chat_models");
const cds = require("@sap/cds");

class GenAIHubChatModel extends SimpleChatModel {
  constructor(params) {
    super(params);
  }

  async _call(messages) {
    try {
      const capllm = await cds.connect.to("cap-llm-plugin");
      let chatResponse = await capllm.getChatCompletion({
        messages: this._convertToChatMessages(messages),
      });
      return chatResponse.content;
    } catch (err) {
      console.log(err);
      return "Error in calling GenAI Hub Chat Model";
    }
  }

  _convertToChatMessages(messages) {
    const chatMessages = [];
    messages.forEach((message) => {
      switch (message.toDict().type) {
        case "human":
          chatMessages.push({
            role: "user",
            content: message.toDict().data.content,
          });
          break;
        case "system":
          chatMessages.push({
            role: "system",
            content: message.toDict().data.content,
          });
          break;
        case "ai":
          chatMessages.push({
            role: "assistant",
            content: message.toDict().data.content,
          });
          break;
      }
    });
    return chatMessages;
  }

  _llmType() {
    return "GenAI Hub Chat Model";
  }

  async *_streamResponseChunks(messages, options, runManager) {
    throw new Error("Streaming of response is not supported!");
  }
}

module.exports = { GenAIHubChatModel };

 

 

Explanation

  1. Class Creation: We create a custom chat model class GenAIHubChatModel by extending the SimpleChatModel class from @langchain/core/language_models/chat_models.

  2. _call Method: This method takes a list of messages and call options (such as stop sequences) and returns a string. It connects to the cap-llm-plugin and retrieves chat completion responses.

  3. _llmType Method: This method returns a string identifying the LLM type for logging purposes.

  4. _convertToChatMessages Method: This method converts messages to a format recognized by the chat model, identifying if the message is sent by a user (human), system, or AI (assistant). In our scenario, since we will be sending data to summarize in the form of a file, it will always be sent by a human.

  5. _streamResponseChunks Method: This method handles large responses from APIs and allows for streaming response chunks. In our case, streaming is not supported, so it simply throws an error.

To learn more about the cap-llm-plugin library, refer to the following blog: documentation.
To create a custom chat model, you can also follow Langchain’s documentation on “How to create a custom chat model class”

Sample Use Case:

For a hands-on experience of these Summarization chain by creating a custom model in a NodeJs-based CAP application and accessing LLMs via GenAI Hub, you can refer to the following repository: cap-summarization-chain.

Tips & Tricks:

  • Although the Langchain uses a default prompt in each of its summarization chains, you can customize it as per your specific needs. You can create your own prompt and pass it as configuration as shown below:

 

 

const { RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter } = require("@langchain/textsplitters");
const { loadSummarizationChain, SummarizationChainParams } = require("langchain/chains");
const { PromptTemplate } = require("@langchain/core/prompts");
const fs = require("fs");
const utilGenAIHub = require("./utilGenAIHub");

const stuffConfig   = { type:"stuff", 
                        prompt:new PromptTemplate({inputVariables: ["text"], template: 'Write a short and concise summary of the following:\n\n\n"{text}"\n\n\nCONCISE SUMMARY:'}) };
const refineConfig  = { type:"refine", 
                        refinePrompt:new PromptTemplate({inputVariables: ["existing_answer","text"], template: 'Your job is to produce a final summary\nWe have provided an existing summary up to a certain point: \"{existing_answer}\"\nWe have the opportunity to refine the existing summary\n(only if needed) with some more context below.\n------------\n\"{text}\"\n------------\n\nGiven the new context, refine the original summary\nIf the context isnt useful, return the original summary.\n\nREFINED SUMMARY:'}),
                        questionPrompt:new PromptTemplate({inputVariables: ["text"], template: 'Write a short and concise summary of the following:\n\n\n"{text}"\n\n\nCONCISE SUMMARY:'}) };
const reduceConfig  = { type:"map_reduce", 
                        combinePrompt:new PromptTemplate({inputVariables: ["text"], template: 'Write a short and concise summary of the following:\n\n\n"{text}"\n\n\nCONCISE SUMMARY:'}),
                        combineMapPrompt:new PromptTemplate({inputVariables: ["text"], template: 'Write a short and concise summary of the following:\n\n\n"{text}"\n\n\nCONCISE SUMMARY:'}) };

const summarize = async function(textDocuments, type) {
  let configParams;
  switch (type) {
    case "stuff":
      configParams = stuffConfig;
      break;
    case "refine":
      configParams = refineConfig;
      break;
    case "map_reduce":
      configParams = reduceConfig;
      break;
  }
  
  const chatModel     = new utilGenAIHub.GenAIHubChatModel({});
  const summaryChain  = loadSummarizationChain(chatModel, configParams);
  const textSummary   = await summaryChain.invoke({ input_documents: textDocuments });
  return textSummary;
}

const getTextDocuments = async function(filePath) {
  const textContent   = fs.readFileSync(filePath, "utf8");
  const textSplitter  = new RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter({ chunkSize: 3000 });
  const textDocuments = await textSplitter.createDocuments([textContent]);
  return textDocuments;
}

module.exports = { summarize, getTextDocuments}
​

 

 

  • Langchain’s summarization chain requires input content in Document format. It is an object with 3 properties: pageContent, metadata, id.

    Example:

 

 

{
   "pageContent": "The Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) is a media franchise and shared universe centered around a series of superhero films and television series produced by Marvel Studios. It features interconnected stories based on characters from Marvel Comics, including iconic heroes like Iron Man, Captain America, and Spider-Man.",  

    "metadata":{"lines": { "from":1, "to":3 } }

}

 

 

  • When working with documents, you might need to transform them to fit your application better. A common transformation is splitting a long document into smaller chunks that can be processed by map-reduce or refine summarization chain. Langchain offers several built-in document transformers to facilitate this, allowing you to split, combine, filter, and manipulate documents as needed.


    In the above sample use-case “RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter” is used. For more details, refer to Text Splitters by Langchain.

Conclusion:

In this blog post we explored how to streamline business insights using Langchain’s advanced summarization techniques, custom models, and SAP GenAI Hub integration. By leveraging Langchain’s summarization chain—encompassing stuff, map-reduce, and refine techniques—and connecting with SAP GenAI Hub via the CAP LLM Plugin, businesses can efficiently extract and secure essential insights from extensive data. This approach not only enhances decision-making and operational strategies but also ensures the effective anonymization of sensitive information, empowering organizations to make more informed and strategic decisions.

At last, I would like to extend my heartfelt gratitude to my colleagues whose insights, support, and collaboration have been invaluable throughout this PoC. So Special thanks to @Ajit_K_Panda  for his guidance and @Aryan_Raj_Sinha  for his valuable contributions in PoC development and @PVNPavanKumar for their leadership support. 

For more information about this topic or to ask a question, please contact us at paa_india@sap.com.

entry.title: Re: Where is data stored maintained in SAP Build Apps (fr...
entry.content:
Hi Christiaens, Thanks for contacting us. Are you still having trouble creating the Application Backend Configuration? Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/introduction-c2f99da6ff24490bbd0e705eb036ce84

entry.title: Re: Comparison of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition) vs. SAC add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

SAC Excel add-in stores the URL within the workbook. So when you open it it connects to this URL automatically. 

Lifecycle is currently not straight forward. You need to use Replace Tenant to switch to the QA/Prod tenant: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/c637c9ff5d61457eb415ce161e38e57b/9e7ddaf495ef4d6d869b325ea225193a.html And then save again the workbook on the QA/Prod system. We are currently in discussion with the content transport team to do this step during the transport. Will show up on the roadmap as soon we have a concrete timeline.

entry.title: Re: Extend CDS View with a new field and ValueHelp
entry.content: Do you have solution for this ??

entry.title: About subscription
entry.content:
Dear Expert team,


Looking for information below. Pls. share.



  2. About SAP subscription model.

  4. What features, licenses and modules are included in our current subscription. Looking for detailed information.

  6. What is the process if you want to extend the current subscription. Any recommendation.?

  8. Want to understand "SAP Subscription Management" in detail, from functional and technical perspective.

  10. If you want to understand the current subscription, who will help in reviewing the current usages, including licenses, unused features/licenses available and how to align the subscription from better utilization perspective.   


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: About subscription
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please note Product Support engineers are not in possession of such detailed information related to customer's contracts to be able to answer some of the questions raised. For such it is advisable to contact your Customer Success Partner (CSP). If you do not know who your CSP is, please reach out to the Digital Engagement team in your region for assistance (https://me.sap.com/notes/KB0394723/en).

For your reference only, please have a check on the following URLs where you should find answers at least to some of your concerns:
https://www.sap.com/about/agreements/policies/cloud-service-specifications.html?search=SAP%20Commerce%20Cloud%20Services%20Description%20&sort=latest_desc&pdf-asset=baa8fc77-227e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b&page=1

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/e1391e5265574bfbb56ca4c0573ba1dc/423eddd3281e46acb2e273e50158a9de.html?locale=en-US

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: I am unable to use excel file for model creation on SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: hello there i am unable to use excel/csv file to create model as it option to use excel/csv file is not showing in my modeler. Can someone help me with the situation?

entry.title: Re: I'm facing issue while registering for External Authentication in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hello Si Ja, Thanks for reaching out to us. Could you please share more information about the issue? If possible, kindly provide a screenshot of the authentication configuration and the error message for further investigation.

entry.title: Re: SAC Add-in file in SAC Environment, transport Dev to...
entry.content:
@Gouse 

Currently the url is not changed automatically when transporting. You have to use the replace tenant feature to change the url and then save the templates in the target tenants.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Quota arrangement for subcontractors
entry.content:
Hello

I am having an issue setting up a quota arrangement for two subcontractors.

We would like to have a 4 to 1 split between the two of them.

I have read multiple articles about the topic and believe that we are setting it up properly but the system still is generating only purchase requisitions and not schedule lines towards both vendors. The split itself is working properly with the correct quantities getting assigned to the respective vendor.

The material master is configured in the following way:
Procurement type: F
Special procurement: 30
Quota arr. usage: 3

We have two scheduling agreements both with validity period between 30.06.2023 and 31.12.2050.
The source list also has the same validity period and the Source List Usage in Materials Planning is configured as 2 for both scheduling agreements (1 for each supplier).

The quota arrangement itself setup for the same validity period with a quote of 4 to 1 between the two suppliers.

The lot-sizing procedure looks as follows:

The first requirement date for the material is 19.07.2024. 

Can you tell what are we doing wrong at the moment? 

Thanks in advance for your support.

Best regards,

Boris Kurdaliev

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David

My name is Abdelrahman Gamal. I am a SAP FI consultant at Edraky. I identify myself as one of the minorities who do not have equal opportunity in their geographic location and also one of the people who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

 I have completed my first learning journey Performing Asset Accounting Processes in SAP S/4HANA. This is truly an amazing initiative by SAP and a great opportunity for me. I'm positively looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thank you

Abdelrahman

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: You will only need your laptop with a web browser (e.g. chrome) that can run BAS. All the technologies will be provided by us 🙂 See you Friday!

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: Hey everyone! I just send an email that we increased the quota and now have 44 seats available 🙂 See all of you on Friday!

entry.title: SEN. SSO in producer fails
entry.content:
Hi all, I have such problem:

Prerequisites

  1. SEN - on premes edition
  2. SSO has been configured and works well
  3. Workarea permissions have been set up

Problem description

Access to the manager with SSO - success

In Producer when the user with appropriate role tries to create workarea from server and selects 

SSO - Using Kerberos

  1. Error - not authorised 
  2. Without SSO (login and password) - everything works well

I tried to take a look into log file but it's empty

Maybe you know how to fix it

Thanks

entry.title: Re: No me aparece en ningún documento mi precio guardado...
entry.content:
Hola César,

Ve a Datos Maestros del Artículo (DMA). En el encabezado del formulario, verifica que hayas ingresado el precio en la lista de precios que coincide con la que se está utilizando en las órdenes de venta.

Luego, verifica en los Datos Maestros del Socio de Negocios: ve a la pestaña Condiciones de pago y asegúrate de que la lista de precios asignada al cliente sea la misma que utilizaste para configurar el precio del artículo.

¡suerte!

entry.title: Business Partner ID Logic
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I received a question from a customer and was wondering if you could help. 

The old BP ID logic was that you had to create 2 IDs if the BO was a customer and also a supplier. 

The new Logic only requires the creation of one ID. 

The question is, if a mix of the two is supported. The existing BPs all have two IDs, but if the customer creates a new BP, could they use the new logic and just create one for both Supplier and Customer? 

Or is it either new or old logic for all? 

Thanks and kind regards

Kathrin

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) | BOT | RPA
entry.content:
Hello Naseem,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Could you please provide more details about the source tenant so we can investigate further?

entry.title: Re: Announcing Global Availability of the Content Generation Assistant in SAP Automation Pilot!
entry.content:
Hi @AlexPJ,

There are no additional costs for using this feature - it is included in the standard plan, and the pricing remains the same. You can find more information on the pricing details in the Discovery Center.

entry.title: Re: F4 Help in Extend CDS view agianst stadard consumption view
entry.content: Did you get the soultion??

entry.title: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HANA memor in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are implementing SAP S4HANA Public Cloud at one of our clients.

We found that, our cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HANA memory consumption is exceeded than the subscribed.

We are not sure how this GB is exceeded as we are still in development phase.

Please refer enclosed image.

 

Requesting to experts if they can throw some light on it.

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: Fiori Elements: delegating action of 1:n associated entity on object page to parent object?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i am evaluating the capabilities of Fiori Elements atm - is there any possibility to do this?

Background: imagine, there is some root entity for which you need to persist the (1..*) "involved business partners".

One child entity (composition) of the BO then would be "involved business partners" e.g. having key of parent entity and business partner id. 

As there is no possibility to have value helps returning multiple keys for that case, an idea would be to also associate the available business partners with the root entity - the data could be displayed as lineitemreference in the object page.

Via annotations one usually can define custom actions which by default invoke actions on the displayed entities (business partners). 

Is there an option to delegate defined custom actions to another (related) object while supplying the selected keys? In my example, it would be the "parent", which then would have need to have some action like "add these business partners as your child entities".

I was trying to find out, what options exist or might come in the future regarding #FORACTION but unfortunately, the documentation is not complete.

Related: can sb help me regarding the syntax for "dataaction"? Usually i't's the action on the displayed entity. But i also saw "BOPF:" (meaning is clear), "PUSHDOWN:" (no idea - used in examples but not documented - e.g. "PUSHDOWN:STTA_C_MP_ProductCopy_new_supplier") and some syntax which seems to fully specify RAP object plus method, also used in examples but not documented (e.g. "com.sap.gateway.srvd.sadl_gw_appmusicdr_definition.v0001.BREAK_UP"). 

Otherwise: any idea, when / if value helps with multi selection become available for Fiori Elements 1:n entities?

Best regards,

 

Robert

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) | BOT | RPA
entry.content: Thank you Sankara for your response. Both tenants are SAP BTP Cockpit tenants. Is there any specific information or details you need regarding the source tenant to assist?

entry.title: Re: Queries regarding Data migration approach for PM Data...
entry.content: If you are using the extensibility for the Maintenance Order object. Then you can add custom fields to store the legacy object numbers and furter the data migration objects get automatically updated with  the added custom list of fields.

entry.title: 401 Unauthorized error calling odata service on on-premise from BTP RAP app
entry.content:
Hi experts! We created a RAP app on BTP and trying where we are calling an oData Service on an on-premise system. We created an entry in cloud connector, communication system, -arragement, etc. In the communication system app, I added my user under "Users for Outbound Communication". when I debugg the app and calling the oData Service I get a provider application error "401 unauthorized". 

Do you know, what has to be done to solve the error?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Document Change Rules, Line Item - Profit Center and...
entry.content:
Hi Nishant, other than document splitting you can try below approaches,

1. For Profit center at document level u can fill dummy/default (3KEH)/No PC then at month end there are programs to transfer balance to respective AR/AP/inventory GL for reporting purpose - Assuming you are using classic GL.

2. If 1 not feasible you can build substitution rules to fill PC/Business area in each document posting.

Please refer below threads hope these are helpful.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-fill-empty-business-area-in-posted-documents/qaq-p/10215025

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/change-the-profit-centre-in-fi-document/qaq-p/10377869

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: o1 coding in ABAP
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I tested o1-preview this weekend. I tested how it handles ABAP programming. It is presented as great at coding, but we all know that ABAP is specific. Although GPT 4o was already doing quite well. Will it do better this time? Is the chain of thought a revolution or not?

By the way, I'm curious to know how many of you are using LLM as a programming assistant, or if it's not that level yet. I honestly have my thoughts, but I wouldn't want to perhaps get ahead of the comments.

I invite you to watch.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio releases
entry.content:
Thanks, Samuel, for your guidance.

I have added myself to receive Signavio notifications in "Manage Cloud Service Availability Notifications", I hope by this I will receive the notification. 

That central place would be great and also it would be good to have an OSS note explaining the release cycle - like 3354958 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP S/4HANA on-premise - General Information on Support Packages Schedules - SAP for Me - or a deck with the release strategy - like SAP S/4HANA Release and Maintenance Strategy Update.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Clear filter button should reset all the filters SAC Analytics Application
entry.content: The solution working perfectly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Management in BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

 

thank you for such an informative blog. I have a scenario wherein post migration, the stock data does not match between the old BW 7.4 and the new BW/4HANA. For a plant and a material i can see all the movements. In BW4HANA these movements are tagged with Record Type = 2.

I even see the Initial Stock in the Reference Table, and in Listcube against Record Type 1.

The issue happens are query level where BW/4HANA is not taking the initial stock into account and is just doing a (Received - Issued) for all the movements. The old BW 7.4 System however is taking the initial stock into account and displaying the final stock accordingly.

Can anyone shed some light on this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant -...
entry.content:
Hi @FeliciaB 
Do you know our digital skills initiative by SAP? 
Please access our Digital skills for SAP where you find our dedicated offerings to boost your career with digital skills - Open new career opportunities with free learning and certification.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: General data type in xlsx file from SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard
entry.content:
Hello,
Recently, when we get Excel output from the reports we created in SAC with the ExportToExcel_1.exportReport() function, if Number Formatting is active, the Measure values ​​in the Excel output are output as a text value such as 1,234.55, and therefore the output is in the General data type, and our users are disturbed by this situation.

If we also turn off Number Formatting, this time the data coming to the model comes as it is. For example, 1,234.5456700.
I think there is such a problem due to the last update, but we could not find a workaround method. If anyone can provide information, I would be glad.

When Number Formatting is active (data type : general but measure with comma)

When Number Formatting is not active (data type: number but measure without formatting)

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP WORLD,
entry.content:
Hi @ROFIDAELHAIDARY ,

Thank you for sharing! It's great to have you onboard.

Check your private messages for an invite. SAP with a background in accounting is a great combination!

entry.title: Re: I have disabled CSRF under https adapter still gettin...
entry.content:
Hi Siva,

Check what is the role that is assigned in the HTTPS adapter , by default "ESBMessaging.send" is assigned.

Assign the same role to the user credential and trigger the request.

Thanks

Sai

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Certificate Expire Notifications Alert in SAP Cloud Integration - iFlow
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As per the logic, i have developed the iflow but i am getting below error:

Error Details
com.sap.xi.mapping.camel.XiMappingException: Runtime exception during processing target field mapping /KeystoreEntries/KeystoreEntry. The root message is: Unparseable date: "2025-09-15", cause: java.text.ParseException: Unparseable date: "2025-09-15"
 
One more Doubt: Mapping logic is applied only Name filed, what about Rest of the Three fields.
 
Please help me

 

Please help me for this error

entry.title: Re: Employee Central Mass Data Management for Position
entry.content:
Good morning, this post has been very useful in helping me understand the functionality for the Mass Data Changes Management tool.  I would like to confirm two things based on what I have read from all the comments:

1) I can not update the job relationships assigned to positions and have it sync to the incumbent's employee record?  If I am correct in this assumption, is there an intention to update this and have it working as an option at some point?

2) Is there anything additional I need to select to ensure that the position changes are syncing down to the incumbent's employee record?

Kind regards, Melinda

entry.title: Re: Hi Everyone
entry.content:
Hi @Makgato - thanks for sharing! An invite is on it's way.

Let me know if you have any questions regarding finding learning content.

entry.title: Cancel A/R Invoice
entry.content:
Hi to all,

We created a delivery and then billed for it, but we didn't bill for the transportation that was included in the delivery. We then manually closed the delivery so that it could no longer be used.
Now, we realized that we had used the wrong exchange rate.
I tried to cancel the A/R Invoice but I get the error “Cancellation is not possible; base documents closed by users”

Is there any solution to cancel the document or do I just have to make a credit memo?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Wave Creation is not possible with Activity area cond...
entry.content:
"The storage bin and the activity area are not displayed in the warehouse request PDO , even the rough bin determination is activated in both WPT and ST"

That means the rough bin determination is not working - and that's why the activity area is not considered for the wave template determination.

So you need to figure out first why the rbd does not work. I think there is no log for it, actually not sure how to find out issues for that.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: Error while calling APIs from Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. Could you please share a screenshot of what you see while checking the destination? Are you able to succeed, or are you encountering an error? If that's the case, I can also suggest creating an action project and incorporating it with BPA. https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/create-actions-project?locale=en-US&q=sap+build+action

entry.title: Re: New Member in the SAP Learning Community
entry.content:
Hi @SMariaGray ,

Welcome aboard! Thanks for sharing.

Reimagine the Customer Journey with SAP Customer Experience Solutions is a great place to start.

entry.title: Custom CDN is not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We are implementing customer CDN on AWS platform the CDN url is working well but when integrated to the SAP S/4HANA not working.

 

After configured the customer CDN, the S/4HANA fiori launchpad URL is not accessible. (see attachment)

 

Kindly suggest?

 

Best


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDN is not working
entry.content:
Dear team,

You will have to make changes to your system to correct for CORS, and the correct channel for consulting questions is the community.  I believe the following blog will help you

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/set-up-a-cdn-for-sapui5-on-your-on-premise-sap-abap-server/ba-p/13517682

All the best

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Add master data scope items to Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Ebba,

you can add scope items mentioned below from SAP Best Practices Content, if you have activated an S/4 HANA Cloud Solution Scenario under your project scope.
Having activated the processes relevant for Master Data, you can use the content of standard test scripts for SAP Clous ALM under Accelerators tab.

Alternatively you can also download the content from SAP Signavio Process Navigator - https://me.sap.com/processnavigator

SAP Best Practices for Master Data:
https://help.sap.com/docs/s4hana-best-practices/s4cld2408-master-data/start?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Inquiry Regarding the Determination of Number Ranges for Contact Persons in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Emal,

this is because of the number range buffering, read the following documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_scm700_ehp02/7.0.2/en-US/47/d56554167e3c84e10000000a42189c/frameset.htm

BR, Alexander

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start - Deactivate button
entry.content:
Hi Gene!

Thank you very much for your valuable feedback! I’m the user assistance lead for SAP Mobile Start, and I’m responsible for UI texts and customer documentation. After reviewing your suggestion, we decided to update the button text to “Dismiss Notification” in English to make it clearer and less ambiguous, rather than removing it. For clarification: The button itself just removes the notification from the Notifications list inside the app. The Dutch translation has also been adjusted accordingly, and you’ll see the new text in the next release.

If you have any other questions, feel free to email us at sapmobilestart@sap.com.

entry.title: Re: Network Request Error: for Post Call from Build apps to Document information extraction service
entry.content:
Hello Jagdeesh,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still encountering the issue? Did you have a chance to share the screenshot of the console error (response from the API)?

entry.title: Re: Langchain Summarization Techniques: Leveraging SAP GenAI Hub via Custom Model
entry.content: Well documented summary of the summarization methods. Nice to see examples with code.

entry.title: Re: Hello !!!
entry.content:
Hi @prcvarma ,

Welcome aboard! An invite is on it's way.

How do you find job demand in your market regarding private vs public cloud?

entry.title: Missing "Transactions and Applications" search provider in Business Client
entry.content:
My company has multiple S/4 HANA on-premise SAP backends. We are using the SAP Business Client 8.00 PL10 to connect to the backend. We want to use the Quick Search Bar to search for transactions. The Business Client Documentation states that the search for transactions is built-in and automatically available:

To conduct a search using the Quick Launch bar, you can use different types of search providers. These providers can be built-in providers such as Windows Desktop Search or Transactions and Applications, search providers defined in the Role Maintenance (PFCG) transaction as well as search providers defined in the front end of the client

The same page also says that the availability of search providers depends on the connection type. Based on the table, when using a Fiori Launchpad connection, only "Desktop Search" and "External Search" providers are available. However, the "Transactions and Applications" search has always worked out-of-the-box without the need for any additional configuration. A different documentation page also mentions the "Transactions and Applications" search provider. It says:

Search Provider: Transactions and Applications
SAP Fiori Launchpad Connection --> 
available/limited SAP GUI transaction tabs

This sounds like the search is also supposed to work with Fiori Launchpad connections. This matches our experiences. I dont know why the documentation states contrary things. I am connecting to the system S1 with a FIORI Launchpad connection, and I can see the two default search providers as well as my user-defined search providers:

Basically, everything works fine. 

Now the problem: We upgraded one of our systems to the SAP 2023 FP1 release. When I connect to that system S2 with a Fiori Launchpad connection using the same Business Client version, I am missing the "Transactions and Applications" search provider. It is not automatically added to the available search providers as I used to on the older release:

When I use the NWBC connection to connect to S2, the "Transactions and Applications" search provider is shown among all the other default providers: 

This proofs that the search is technically available and functioning - its simply not shown when using the Fiori Launchpad connection. Did the upgrade possibly change a configuration somewhere wich causes this behaviour? I would like to get the search back to working with FLP connections.

entry.title: Re: Hi SAP World !!!
entry.content:
Hi @MCHANDANKUMAR ,

Thanks for sharing. When was the first time SAP entered your life in terms of a potential career opportunity?

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Commerce as PIM in CCV2 + Licensing cost
entry.content:
Dear Karthik,

If you're using SAP Commerce Cloud (CCv2) as a PIM (Product Information Management) system, the licensing cost is typically for the full SAP Commerce platform. There isn't a specific reduced price for just using it as a PIM. Licensing costs can depend on your specific agreement with SAP, so it's best to speak directly with your SAP representative or sales team to see if there are any special pricing options available.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: IBAN for Hungary generates incorect Bank Key and Account Number
entry.content: See this link: https://bank-code.net/iban/structure/hungary-international-bank-account-number

entry.title: Possible to delete pre-delivered number ranges and create year independent ones?
entry.content:
I would like to delete pre-delivered number ranges and create fiscal year independent ones.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Possible to delete pre-delivered number ranges and cr...
entry.content: Please note it's not possible to delete pre-delivered number ranges and it's highly recommended to use Fiscal Year Dependent number ranges. However, as per the following documentation it is possible to create your own number ranges with a validity period very far in the future, effectively making the number range year-independent - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/3e60d7531a4d424de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: IBAN for Hungary generates incorect Bank Key and Acco...
entry.content:
Your account should be 

70250304-00055970

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Istanbul 2024
entry.content: It was a very enjoyable and useful event. I would like to thank all the speakers and organizers.

entry.title: Re: Error/Mistake on website
entry.content:
Hi @Rizwan17 ,

Thanks for letting us know - I'll report it.

entry.title: PM Master Data Mass Change Program
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I am working on SAP Rise platform . Need to develop program for mass change of Equipment task list including operation , component, packages etc . Can any one please suggest the best method to be followed like using BAPI, BADI etc to develop a program on SAP Rise platform ? 

Thanking you .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: How to calculate next or previous time member in BPC script logic
entry.content:
Great! Thank you for providing these good solutions.

I don't understand the calculation for previous year

*SELECT(%TIDM01%,[TIMEID],TIME,YEAR=%Y% AND MONTHNUM=1 AND CALC=N) //%TIDM01%=20070100
*SELECT(%TIDL%,[TIMEID],TIME,TIMEID<%TIDM01%) //%TIDL%=...20061100,20061200
*SELECT(%PREVYEAR%,[YEAR],TIME,TIMEID>=%TIDL% AND TIMEID<%TIDM01%)

2 select conditions on the same field act like an OR-condition. %TIDL% is a list of TIMEIDs. Why does the previous year calculation work???

TIMEID >= 20040100, ..., 20061100, 20061200 OR TIMEID < 20070100

Does BPC takes the last value of the TIMEID-List? In this case, why don't we use

*SELECT(%PREVYEAR%, [YEAR], TIME, TIMEID = %TIDL%)

entry.title: Re: I am unable to use excel file for model creation on S...
entry.content:
@SAJINDRA 

What options do you see when you click on "Create New Model". I think You would see 2 options as shown below.

 

Next you would see option to select data source and then you can select the Flat file option and then go ahead and select the file.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Group Reporting Elimination with quantities
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

We are implementing Group Reporting for a new customer.

They would like to eliminate the quantity during their elimination of Sales. 

We changed the breakdown category to be able to record quantity. However, the system is asking for a fixed value for unit of measure. So we can only eliminate one unit of measure even tough our customer have many.

We see here that we need a fixed value for Unit of Measure: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8e3e8daffe194b1ab70179b4da603aab/26a5c6535e601e4be10000000a174cb4.html

Is there a way to be able to eliminate quantities if we have multiple unit of measure?

Thank you for your help

@FlorianRoll

entry.title: 🇦🇹 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Vienna, Austria)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 08 November 2024 in Vienna, Austria  from 09:00 - 16:00 GMT+1. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: SCC EDV-Beratung AG, Mantlergasse 30-32, 1130 Vienna, Austria
The instructor is Lukas Bretschneider

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

The event is kindly being hosted by SCC EDV-Beratung AG, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

 

SAP Managed Tags:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment,

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment,
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Define Company Code successor Create Company issues
entry.content:
The successor to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 100529 "Define Company Code" has limited functionality in comparison to the new version 106040 "Create Company".

It is not possible to edit the company code details in the new SSCUI. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Define Company Code successor Create Company issues
entry.content: Please see the KBA 3525838 - Define Company Code successor Create Company issues

entry.title: Re: Document Change Rules, Line Item - Profit Center and...
entry.content: Hi @sumesh_gupta i am using new GL so point no. 1 is not feasible and i don't want to build any substitution rules to fill PC/Business area in each document posting. Please update if any other solution available , it will be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Explaining SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) to a Beginner
entry.content: Excellent , easy to understand for a beginner

entry.title: Re: BPC complexe input form
entry.content: Hello Mandar Iits a pleasure to read you

entry.title: Automated updates in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi guys

I am currently working with SAP Enable Now and am new to its various components.

I have a question regarding the integration of change logs into manuals. I have over 200 manuals and would like to add details about changes, such as who created each manual and who made the most recent modifications on all the manuals. I’ve noticed that the change log for all manuals is stored in Producer, so I’m hoping there’s a way to transfer that data automatically to each manual.

While I can add the change log to the original template that were used, I would like to avoid manually updating each individual manual that was created with the old version of the template, which doesn’t include the change log.

Is there a way to automate the display of the change log on the front slide of each manual? Any insights or suggestions on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks for any help

entry.title: Re: BEHAVIOR IN STATUS PROFILES IN SALES VA02:
entry.content:
Hi @carlosgomezp, 

We can set up the above using the requirement using the Lowest and Highest status numbers given in each status.
Change the Lowest Status number from 1 as 5, in the 3 rd line.
you will get the desired result.

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build version not the same as tutorials.
entry.content:
I have updated the basic barcode scanner tutorial, https://developers.sap.com/mission.appgyver-low-code.html, and the tutorials that use OData should be OK, like the Social Media tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/mission.sap-build-apps-social-media.html

I do not know who manages the learning content you linked to

I would like to share a bit about myself as I seek your support for the certification attempt. I identify as a person in the below categories:

  1. Women
  2. First generation college students
  3. People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I am eager to learn and enhance my skills, and I would greatly appreciate any assistance or consideration you can provide regarding my request.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Date difference between current date and service cont...

entry.title: Re: Reverting Container to the latest published version CLEARS ALL COMPONENTS of my app
entry.content: There was a problem recently with the Build Service (my builds also failed but now working) ... is your build working now?

entry.title: Re: No goods receipt possible for purchase order Number and Item number.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

When I create a Goods Reciept with reference to Purchase Order using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, the following error message appears.

No goods receipt possible for purchase order <PO number> <line item number>.

But the GR is getting created manually using Transaction MIGO for the same PO number.

Here is the code:

SELECT deliverydocument,             "vbeln
             deliverydocumentitem,         "posnr
             plant                         "werks
             FROM i_deliverydocumentitem   "lips
             INTO TABLE @DATA(dlv_item)
             WHERE deliverydocument IN @inb_delv             " OR deliverydocument IN @delv_num )
             AND plant IN @Store.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        SELECT deliverydocument,          "vbeln
               supplier                   "lifnr
            FROM i_deliverydocument       "likp
            INTO TABLE @DATA(dlv_hdr)
            FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @dlv_item
            WHERE deliverydocument = @dlv_item-deliverydocument
            AND deliverydate IN @s_date_tmp
            AND sddocumentcategory = '7'.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.

          SELECT businesspartner,              "partner
                 bpidentificationtype,         "type
                 bpidentificationnumber        "idnumber
                 FROM i_bupaidentification     "but0id
                 INTO TABLE @DATA(bp_id)
                 FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @dlv_hdr
                 WHERE businesspartner = @dlv_hdr-supplier
                 AND   bpidentificationtype = 'GLREG'.
          IF sy-subrc = 0.

            SELECT low
              FROM ztle_constant
              INTO TABLE @DATA(legacy_vendor)
              WHERE name = 'ZS4_LEGACY_VENDOR'.
            IF sy-subrc = 0 AND legacy_vendor IS NOT INITIAL.

              LOOP AT bp_id ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_bp_id>).
*                READ TABLE legacy_vendor WITH KEY low = <lfs_bp_id>-bpidentificationnumber TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
*                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                IF line_exists( legacy_vendor[ low = <lfs_bp_id>-bpidentificationnumber ] ).
                  IF NOT dlv_hdr IS INITIAL.
                    DELETE dlv_hdr WHERE supplier = <lfs_bp_id>-businesspartner.
                  ELSE.
                    EXIT.
                  ENDIF.
                ENDIF.
              ENDLOOP.
            ENDIF.

            IF NOT dlv_hdr IS INITIAL.
              SELECT deliverydocument,                      "vbeln
                     deliverydocumentitem,                  "posnr
                     material,                              "matnr
                     plant,                                 "werks
                     actualdeliveryquantity,                "lfimg
                     baseunit,                              "Meins
                     referencesddocument,                   "vgbel
                     referencesddocumentitem,               "vgpos
                     goodsmovementstatus                    "wbsta
                     FROM i_deliverydocumentitem            "lips
                     INTO TABLE @DATA(dlv_item_final)
                     FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @dlv_hdr
                     WHERE deliverydocument = @dlv_hdr-deliverydocument
                     AND   ( goodsmovementstatus = 'A'
                     OR    goodsmovementstatus = 'B').
              IF sy-subrc = 0.
                SORT dlv_item_final BY referencesddocument referencesddocumentitem.
*                DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM dlv_item_final COMPARING referencesddocument referencesddocumentitem.

                SELECT b~purchasingdocument,                      "ebeln
                       b~purchasingdocumentitem,                  "ebelp
                       b~supplierconfirmationcontrolkey,          "bstae
                       a~purchasingdocumenttype                   "bsart
                       FROM i_purchasingdocumentitem AS b         "ekpo
                       INNER JOIN i_purchasingdocument AS a       "ekko
                       ON b~purchasingdocument = a~purchasingdocument
                       FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @dlv_item_final
                       WHERE b~purchasingdocument = @dlv_item_final-referencesddocument
                       AND   b~purchasingdocumentitem = @dlv_item_final-referencesddocumentitem+1(5)
                       AND   b~supplierconfirmationcontrolkey IN ( 'Z002' , 'Z003' )
                       AND   a~purchasingdocumenttype = 'ZDNB'
                       INTO TABLE @DATA(dsp_po).
                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  SORT dsp_po BY purchasingdocument purchasingdocumentitem.
*                  DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM dsp_po COMPARING purchasingdocument purchasingdocumentitem.
                  LOOP AT dlv_item_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_item>).
                    DATA(index) = sy-tabix.
*                    READ TABLE dsp_po WITH KEY purchasingdocument = <lfs_item>-referencesddocument
*                                               purchasingdocumentitem = <lfs_item>-referencesddocumentitem+1(5)
*                                               BINARY SEARCH
*                                               TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
*                    IF sy-subrc NE 0.
                    IF NOT line_exists( dsp_po[ purchasingdocument = <lfs_item>-referencesddocument
                                                purchasingdocumentitem = <lfs_item>-referencesddocumentitem+1(5) ] ).
                      DELETE dlv_item_final INDEX index.
                    ENDIF.
                  ENDLOOP.
                ENDIF.
              ELSE.
                MESSAGE 'GR is already done for this delivery'(007) TYPE 'I'.
                LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING.
              ENDIF.


              CLEAR: goodsmvt_item.
              SORT dlv_hdr BY deliverydocument.
*              DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM dlv_hdr COMPARING deliverydocument.
              SORT dlv_item_final BY  deliverydocument deliverydocumentitem.
*              DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM dlv_item_final COMPARING referencesddocument referencesddocumentitem.

              LOOP AT dlv_hdr ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_dlv_hdr>).
                READ TABLE dlv_item_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_dlv_item>) WITH KEY deliverydocument = <lfs_dlv_hdr>-deliverydocument
                                                                                                             BINARY SEARCH.
                IF sy-subrc = 0.
                  DATA(item_indx) = sy-tabix.

                  goodsmvt_header-pstng_date = sy-datum.
                  goodsmvt_header-ref_doc_no = <lfs_dlv_item>-referencesddocument.
                  goodsmvt_code-gm_code      = gm_code_gr.

                  LOOP AT dlv_item_final ASSIGNING <lfs_item> FROM item_indx.
                    IF <lfs_item>-deliverydocument NE <lfs_dlv_hdr>-deliverydocument.
                      EXIT.
                    ENDIF.
                    APPEND VALUE #(            material             =  <lfs_item>-material
                                               plant                =  <lfs_item>-plant
                                               no_more_gr           =  abap_true
                                               mvt_ind              =  movement_indicator
                                               move_type            =  movement_type_gr
                                               entry_qnt            =  <lfs_item>-actualdeliveryquantity
                                               entry_uom            =  <lfs_item>-baseunit
                                               po_number            =  <lfs_item>-referencesddocument
                                               po_item              =  <lfs_item>-referencesddocumentitem+1(5)
                                               ref_doc              =  <lfs_item>-referencesddocument
                                               ref_doc_it           =  <lfs_item>-referencesddocumentitem+1(5)
                                               deliv_numb           =  <lfs_item>-deliverydocument
                                               deliv_item           =  <lfs_item>-deliverydocumentitem  ) TO goodsmvt_item.
                  ENDLOOP.

                  IF goodsmvt_item IS NOT INITIAL.
                    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'
                      EXPORTING
                        goodsmvt_header  = goodsmvt_header
                        goodsmvt_code    = goodsmvt_code
                      IMPORTING
                        materialdocument = materialdocument
                        matdocumentyear  = matdocumentyear
                      TABLES
                        goodsmvt_item    = goodsmvt_item
                        return           = return.

                    READ TABLE return WITH KEY type = 'E' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
                    IF sy-subrc = 0.
                      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
                    ELSE.
                      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
                        EXPORTING
                          wait = abap_true.
                    ENDIF.

ENDIF.
                ENDIF.
              ENDLOOP.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Configuration Guide for E-Bilanz (Option 3)
entry.content:
Hi,

 

thank you for the great description.

Could you help me with the leading file for Austrian Taxonomy? 

The zip file will not be accepted.... I cannot choose any .xsd files, because it won't open:

I downloaded the zip file from here: E-Bilanz (bmf.gv.at)

Best regards,

Alina

entry.title: Identity Provisioning For Employee Central Payroll (PAY-24026) - Groups supported?
entry.content:
In the 2H 2024 release SAP has provided the option to provision users in ECP from IPS (using the SCIM integration). The release item and implementation documentation do not make it clear if you can sync groups to ECP to assign permissions.

Use case I am looking for:

Use EC/IAS to assign employees to permission groups and re-use these group assignments to grant managers and payroll admins additional permissions in ECP. Is this possible? If so, how to configure?

entry.title: Re: Copy data from one BTP ABAP Instance to Another BTP ABAP Instance
entry.content: Hi @Muthu, what kind of data do you want to copy? Why do you want to copy the data/what is the use case?

entry.title: Query with Last Invoice Date
entry.content:
I am looking to create a report showing

All suppliers

Payment Terms

Current Account Balance

Last purchase invoice date

I can get all fields correct apart from the date of that suppliers last invoice date.

Can anyone assist please?

entry.title: Re: "wrapper-macosx-universal-64: Bad CPU type in executa...
entry.content:
Hi,

Generally, it happens when a software compiled for Intel-based Macs is executed on ARM processors.
Can you please check which one is yours.

You can install Rosetta 2 on your Mac.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Build Apps Preview Editable not working
entry.content:
Same thing happens to me. Just to clarify the situation:

  • If no version was created, everything is fine.
  • If I create a version, and preview that version, everything is fine.
  • If I create a version, and preview the "editable" copy, this either hangs on web or gives error message on mobile.
